headline: Axon’s Denver Camera Deal Highlights Growth Hopes And Privacy Risks
summary: Axon Enterprise secured a new contract to supply license plate camera technology to the Denver Police Department. The contract was approved by the Denver City Council as the city debates surveillance practices and privacy protections. The deal expands Axon's footprint with municipal customers and ties its technology directly to ongoing public policy discussions. Axon Enterprise (NasdaqGS:AXON), trading at $412.81, is securing attention not just for its product lineup but for where its...

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on AppLovin Corporation (APP) Amid Strong Leadership Position
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Large-Cap Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. AppLovin Corporation is one of the stocks with insider buying.
